status: v1 — calibrated against the official Jacaranda Society logo (purple shield, white jacaranda tree); pending final calibration against legacy report decks

primary.usage: titles, section headers, chart primary series, table header fill

dark.usage: cover background, footer text, chart axis labels, emphasis

light.usage: secondary chart series, dividers, table zebra rows, chips

tint.usage: card fills, callout backgrounds, table alternate rows

muted.usage: footnotes, source lines, data dates, page numbers

positive.usage: positive financial change ONLY (growth, beat, upside)

negative.usage: negative financial change ONLY (decline, miss, downside)

chart_series.note: Use in order; never use signal green/red as a generic series colour.

rules: Green/red are reserved for positive/negative financial signals; never decorative.
Never place body text (#25232A) on primary or dark purple; use inverse white.
Minimum contrast: 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large display numbers.

typography.note: Logo lockup uses a serif smallcaps emblem and a rounded sans wordmark; decks use system-safe fonts that echo that pairing and must survive PowerPoint editing on machines without custom fonts.

cjk_heading.value: Source Han Serif SC / 思源宋体

cjk_body.value: Source Han Sans SC / 思源黑体

numeric.note: All figures/tables use lining tabular numerals in the sans face for both editions.

rules: Chinese editions never justify text; English editions use left alignment only.
Chinese punctuation is full-width; no line may start with 。，、；：）or end with （.
English titles use sentence case, not ALL CAPS (caps are reserved for the logo emblem).

logo.asset: assets/brand/jacaranda-logo.png (transparent master, to be committed in the brand-assets PR)
logo.description: Purple shield with white jacaranda tree and 'THE JACARANDA SOCIETY' emblem text; 'Jacaranda Stock Market Society' wordmark below.
rules: Never stretch, recolour, outline, or add effects to the logo.
On purple/dark backgrounds use the white-on-purple master as-is; never invert colours manually.
Emblem text inside the shield must remain legible; if rendered height < 0.4in, it is acceptable because the shield reads as a mark.

border.style: horizontal rules only, no vertical grid

table.unit_row: Units/currency stated once in the column header or a caption line, never repeated per cell.

chart.data_labels: Only on <=8 data points; otherwise axis only.
chart.source_caption: Every chart carries its own '来源/Source: SRC-xxx' caption plus data date.

iconography.style: thin-line monochrome (#563F7C), no emoji, no clip art
